---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new view, table, or data integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Problem this would solve

What is missing on the dashboard today, or what would be easier with this
feature in place. Plain language is fine.

### Proposed solution

Describe the feature. A rough sketch or wireframe is welcome.

### Data sources required

If this needs new data, list the sources we would need to ingest (ECGB,
Wikipedia, Pakistani news outlets, official portal). Note whether the data
exists publicly today.

### Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

### Anything else

Context, links, screenshots from other dashboards, or prior art.
